g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens during model training in the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What gets logged to MLflow during a training run?')
sendPrompt('What does registering a model in MLflow mean?')
sendPrompt('What does Staging mean in MLflow model lifecycle?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a model is promoted to Production in MLflow?')
sendPrompt('What joblib file does DVC save as output?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI load the production model?')
